title: Implement authorization, allowlists, and action policy

environment.os: Windows local; GitHub Actions Ubuntu and Windows

commands.name: Missing test-authorization module and HTTP routes
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/test-authorization.test.ts --project property tests/property/test-authorization.property.test.ts --project integration tests/integration/test-authorization.test.ts apps/web/tests/integration/test-authorization-routes.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: All four suites failed to import the not-yet-implemented policy module or routes and zero tests ran

commands.name: Undefined authorization acceptance steps
commands.expectedFailure: The six prior scenarios passed while three authorization scenarios and twenty-two steps were undefined

commands.name: Authorization schema and deterministic policy properties
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/test-authorization.test.ts tests/unit/domain-schemas.test.ts --project property tests/property/test-authorization.property.test.ts

commands.name: PostgreSQL, queue-trigger, and HTTP policy boundaries
Browser assertion exposed native option visibility semantics
commands.expectedFailure: The new scenarios reached the authorization API but the step incorrectly waited for a native select option to become visible instead of attached

commands.name: Production build and focused visual capture
commands.command: pnpm --filter @pactwire/web build && PACTWIRE_CAPTURE_CURATED_EVIDENCE=1 PACTWIRE_EVIDENCE_TASK=AUT-03 PACTWIRE_BDD_PRODUCTION=1 pnpm test:bdd

commands.name: Static and focused integration regression
commands.command: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm exec vitest run --project integration apps/web/tests/integration/test-authorization-routes.test.ts tests/integration/test-authorization.test.ts

commands.name: Full gate exposed stale domain migration inventory expectation
commands.expectedFailure: The new policy migration correctly raised the domain table total from twenty-one to twenty-two, while one evidence assertion still expected the former count

commands.name: Full gate exposed stale verification-manifest inventory expectation
commands.expectedFailure: All product integration tests passed, while the evidence harness still expected five manifests instead of the six now present

commands.name: Repository credential-pattern scan
commands.command: rg -n -P --hidden with token-boundary patterns and generated/vendor exclusions; no matches is success

commands.name: Windows clean-checkout browser setup race
commands.command: GitHub Actions run 29705997132, Windows job 88242995881: pnpm verify
commands.expectedFailure: The software POST persisted successfully with status 201, but the authorization setup step waited for a transient success banner that disappeared during the development server's first-route refresh

commands.name: Windows CI-mode browser regression after durable setup assertion
Complete local verification after Windows browser fix
Clean-checkout verification on Ubuntu and Windows

scenarios.scenario: A privacy officer records current test authority and scope
Expired authorization cannot pass the run queue gate
Redirects, popups, and actions stay inside deterministic policy

assets.altText: Desktop authorization panel showing a current human attestation, authority basis, review and expiry dates, exact domains, actions, and redirect and popup policy.
assets.caption: The current policy names the signed district actor and makes the exact browser boundary readable before any run queues.

assets.altText: Narrow authorization panel showing a blocked delete action and recorded delete, popup, and outside-domain redirect decisions.
assets.caption: Three distinct out-of-policy attempts stop with fixed reason codes, direct messages, and no raw query string in the append-only history.

proofs.description: Attestation, date, exact-path, redirect, popup, action, and effective-status examples
Seeded outside-domain, outside-action, expired, and revoked authorization properties
PostgreSQL policy transactions, audits, revocation, queue gate, and direct-SQL bypass rejection
Signed actor, permission, decision, expiry, revocation, invalid-attestation, and isolation HTTP checks
Human scope setup, expired queue denial, and redirect, popup, and action browser journeys
Playwright authorization steps, URL stability, zero-popup assertion, strict error gate, and visual capture
Deterministic policy evaluator, service, bounded decisions, and in-memory/PostgreSQL repositories
Append-only decisions and database-enforced current human authorization for queued runs
Responsive direct-language authorization setup, scope, gate, decision history, and revocation interface
Curated AUT-03 red/green record, visual explanation, and bounded limitations

knownLimitations: AUT-03 proves authorization and queue eligibility; later runner tasks will call the same deterministic gate during real model-operated execution.
The controlled browser fixture uses in-memory state while PostgreSQL persistence and the direct SQL queue trigger are verified independently.
Raw GitHub Actions artifacts follow the repository retention policy; the curated, source-bound screenshots remain in this repository.
